scopedExceptions.layer: Phase 2 / PR-1 Role Shell Consistency (role-lock de-polling)
scopedExceptions.note: Narrow, owner-approved carve-out from the apps/web/components/platform-v7 forbidden zone for exactly these two files. The broad zone stays forbidden (default-deny). Operator-only — deliberately NOT added to agentWritableScope. No cabinet rewrite, no business-logic change.

Narrow, owner-approved carve-out from the apps/web/lib/platform-v7 forbidden zone for exactly these two files (route/access policy only). The broad zone stays forbidden (default-deny). Operator-only — deliberately NOT added to agentWritableScope. Routing/access policy only: support classified internal (oversight-only), investor classified non-core (oversight-only); behavior-preserving (participants were already denied), now explicit + tested. No cabinet rewrite, no business-logic change, no server-side RBAC.

scopedExceptions.layer: Phase 2 / PR-3 dual bank entry routing decision
scopedExceptions.note: Narrow, owner-approved carve-out (routing/access policy + the bank/clean route file only) for the dual-bank-entry decision. Canonical bank cabinet = /platform-v7/bank; /platform-v7/bank/clean becomes a thin redirect alias. Bank role home + nav repointed to canonical; allowedPrefixes keeps the alias reachable. The broad apps/web/components/platform-v7 + lib/platform-v7 + app/platform-v7 zones stay forbidden (default-deny). Operator-only — NOT in agentWritableScope. No bank cockpit rewrite, no money/MoneyEngine/SettlementEngine change, no server-side RBAC, no live bank integration.

scopedExceptions.layer: Phase 2 / PR-4 arbitrator legacy import cleanup
scopedExceptions.note: Narrow, owner-approved carve-out (import/wrapper boundary only) for the arbitrator legacy-import cleanup. The active /platform-v7/arbitrator page no longer imports a page default-export from the legacy app/platform-v7r route tree; the dispute-room cockpit was relocated byte-identically into a canonical components/platform-v7 component (no UI/logic change). The legacy v7r route is left untouched (read-only, dead duplicate). The broad cockpit/lib/app zones stay forbidden (default-deny). Operator-only — NOT in agentWritableScope. No cockpit rewrite, no dispute/arbitration business-logic change, no server-side RBAC, no live integration.

scopedExceptions.layer: Phase 2 / PR-5 role cabinet loading-state consistency
scopedExceptions.note: Narrow, owner-approved carve-out (additive route-level loading.tsx only) for the five role segments without a dedicated layout.tsx (lab, surveyor, compliance, arbitrator, support). Each loading.tsx renders a shared neutral cockpit skeleton built on the canonical Skeleton primitive; no page/cabinet content is touched and no error.tsx is added (error already covered uniformly by the existing root app/platform-v7/error.tsx). The broad cockpit/app zones stay forbidden (default-deny). Operator-only — NOT in agentWritableScope. No cabinet rewrite, no redesign, no business-logic change, no server-side RBAC. Empty-state for static-array cabinets (Surveyor/Compliance) remains a later content-level follow-up.

Narrow, owner-approved carve-out (one content-local empty-state guard) for the Surveyor cabinet's static assignment list: renders the canonical EmptyState when there are no assignments, otherwise the existing list (non-empty render preserved). Additive ternary only — no redesign, no business-logic change. Compliance has no page-local list (shared always-populated cockpit components) so it is intentionally not touched; a shared-cockpit empty path is a broader cross-role item, deferred. The broad cockpit/app zones stay forbidden (default-deny). Operator-only — NOT in agentWritableScope.

scopedExceptions.layer: Phase 4B server-side cabinet enforcement — report-only scaffold
scopedExceptions.note: Narrow, owner-approved carve-out (report-only scaffold). Adds a pure resolveServerCabinetAccess + observeServerCabinetAccess helper and wires it into the web route layer (middleware platform-v7 block) NON-BLOCKING behind PLATFORM_V7_SERVER_CABINET_RBAC=report (off by default → zero effect). Reads ONLY the trusted session-cookie role (never path/pc-role/query/client guard); unverified session = unknown, never blocked; emits a diagnostic only on would-be-deny. enforced is always false — there is no block-mode, no redirect, no UX change, no route deletion, no auth rewrite, no layout.tsx change, no apps/landing change. Block-mode (4C, one cabinet, bank) requires a separate explicit approval. Operator-only — NOT in agentWritableScope.

Narrow, owner-approved carve-out (verified-identity hardening, still report-only). Adds an edge-safe Web-Crypto HS256 verifier (verifyHs256Jwt / readVerifiedCabinetRole) + API→cabinet role map; the report-only middleware observation now derives the role ONLY from a cryptographically verified JWT in pc_access_token — the unverified pc_session_present cookie role is no longer trusted, and demo/fake/bad-signature/wrong-secret/expired/unmapped tokens resolve to null = unknown = never blocked. Reads nothing from path/query/pc-role/client guards. Middleware became async but verifies ONLY under PLATFORM_V7_SERVER_CABINET_RBAC=report (off by default → zero effect). No block-mode, no redirect, no UX change, no route deletion, no auth rewrite, no layout.tsx change, no apps/landing change. Block-mode (4C, bank only) requires separate explicit approval after report metrics from a verified-session deployment. Operator-only — NOT in agentWritableScope.

readiness: Код controlled-pilot готов = 100% code-ready. Full web vitest GREEN 585 files / 3702 tests; ci/tsc, web-unit, build, autopilot-guard, CodeQL зелёные на каждом PR. Integration seam: adapter-factory mock↔real, bank-adapter-real + bank-callback, cabinet-level RBAC за флагом.
